<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# backend/services/model_compare_service.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:54Z

## Purpose
§68.11 Multi-model comparison — "which model wins?"

Joins functional + cost + safety logs for the requested (model_id,
eval_set) tuples and returns a side-by-side scorecard. Persists the
comparison_id + scorecard to data/agent-supervisor/model_compare/
<comparison_id>/manifest.json so the operator can re-read.

Composes with §68.8 (functional eval source-of-truth) + §68.9 (cost
eval) + §68.10 (safety eval) — this surface is the **join**, not a
new source. Adding §68.11 doesn't introduce any new JSONL log; it
reuses the three existing ones.

Per §57.7: if any source log is missing/unreadable, the matching
sub-scorecard surfaces as `found_in: []` and the comparison still
completes — partial data beats no data.

Composes with §38.3 audit + §47.6 (PII never in row — only hashes)
+ §64.43 #7 (federation).

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import logging
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import re
- from `_` import time
- from `_` import uuid
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any
- from `services` import cost_eval_service

## Inputs
- Env vars: INSUR_MODEL_COMPARE_DIR

## Process
### Functions
- `_manifest_dir()`: (no docstring)
- `_safety_verdict_rank()`: Lower rank = better verdict.
- `_latest_functional_for(model_id, eval_set)`: Find the most-recent functional eval row for (model_id, eval_set).
- `_cost_for(model_id, tenant_id)`: Aggregate cost across all-time for (model_id, tenant_id).
- `_latest_safety_for(model_id)`: Find the most-recent safety eval row + verdict for model_id.
- `_build_scorecard(models, eval_set, tenant_id)`: Build the per-model scorecard rows + winner block.
- `_persist_manifest(manifest)`: Write the manifest to data/agent-supervisor/model_compare/<id>/manifest.json.
- `run_comparison(models)`: Execute a comparison. Returns the manifest + comparison_id.
- `get_comparison(comparison_id)`: Read back a persisted comparison manifest.
- `list_history(limit)`: List recent comparisons (newest-first by directory mtime).

## Outputs
- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Hard caps to prevent runaway requests.
- No tenant filter — pull from /by-model ranking
- Functional headline metrics
- Winner determination — per-axis, against rows that have data.
- Safety verdict winner: lowest rank (best verdict) wins
